creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

Unfortunately, because of the nature of KDE's decisions to install 
*.desktop files if a program exists on your computer, it's really 
impossible to create clean packaging lists.  So I will wait for 
bento to go through the kde stuff and will use that to correct the 
packaging lists.  Thanks for your PR, however...
